hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *vault/companies/* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *_index.json ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *_summary.json ]]; then SLUG=$(echo "$FILE" | sed "s|.*vault/companies/||" | cut -d/ -f1); IDX="/Users/wangguanjie/Desktop/Claude Data/共创产品/vault/_index.json"; if [ -f "$IDX" ]; then HAS=$(grep -c "\"$SLUG\"" "$IDX" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$HAS" = "0" ]; then echo "[vault-hook] ⚠️ Company \"$SLUG\" not found in _index.json! Must add before proceeding."; else echo "[vault-hook] $FILE written. Verify _index.json research_count and dimensions_covered are current."; fi; fi; fi'

bash -c 'VAULT="/Users/wangguanjie/Desktop/Claude Data/共创产品/vault"; TOTAL=$(find "$VAULT/companies" -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); FILES=$(find "$VAULT/companies" -type f ! -name .DS_Store 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$FILES" -gt 2000 ]; then echo "[RAG-threshold] ⚠️ Vault has $FILES files across $TOTAL companies. Consider upgrading to RAG (embedding + vector search) for better retrieval efficiency. Threshold: 2000 files or 30 companies."; elif [ "$TOTAL" -gt 30 ]; then echo "[RAG-threshold] ⚠️ Vault has $TOTAL companies. Consider upgrading to RAG."; fi'

bash -c 'VAULT="/Users/wangguanjie/Desktop/Claude Data/共创产品/vault"; TOTAL=$(find "$VAULT/companies" -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); FILES=$(find "$VAULT/companies" -type f ! -name .DS_Store 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); echo "[context] $(date +%Y-%m-%d) | Vault: $TOTAL companies, $FILES files"'
